arts.ttl: Villarreal raise asking price for Spain star amid interest
arts.sum: Villarreal managed to hold onto Olympic and Euro 2024 champion Alex Baena over the summer, in spite of him finishing as the leading assist-provider in La Liga last season. That task looks increasingly difficult next summer, with the 23-year-old picking up where he left off last season. A recent report stated that Barcelona are the […] The post Villarreal raise asking price for Spain star amid interest appeared first on Football España.
